scenarios.name: segments stay sealed from other artists until the host reveals

steps.sql: INSERT INTO app_exquisite_corpse__rounds (id, title, theme, visibility, status, turn_order, panel_height, created_by_id, created_by_name, created_at, archived) VALUES (?, ?, '', 'everyone', 'open', ?, 300, ?, 'Host', ?, 0)
INSERT INTO app_exquisite_corpse__segments (id, round_id, member_id, member_name, position, file_id, file_url, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'Host', 0, '', ?, ?)
SELECT id FROM app_exquisite_corpse__segments WHERE round_id = ?
SELECT id FROM app_exquisite_corpse__segments WHERE round_id = ?
UPDATE app_exquisite_corpse__rounds SET status = 'revealed' WHERE id = ?
SELECT id FROM app_exquisite_corpse__segments WHERE round_id = ?
UPDATE app_exquisite_corpse__rounds SET status = 'revealed', revealed_at = ? WHERE id = ?
SELECT id FROM app_exquisite_corpse__segments WHERE round_id = ?

scenarios.name: an artist may only submit one panel per round

steps.sql: INSERT INTO app_exquisite_corpse__rounds (id, title, theme, visibility, status, turn_order, panel_height, created_by_id, created_by_name, created_at, archived) VALUES (?, ?, '', 'everyone', 'open', ?, 300, ?, 'Host', ?, 0)
INSERT INTO app_exquisite_corpse__segments (id, round_id, member_id, member_name, position, file_id, file_url, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'Host', 0, '', ?, ?)
INSERT INTO app_exquisite_corpse__segments (id, round_id, member_id, member_name, position, file_id, file_url, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'Host', 0, '', ?, ?)

scenarios.name: the hand-off connectors are shared with other artists while the round is open

steps.sql: INSERT INTO app_exquisite_corpse__rounds (id, title, theme, visibility, status, turn_order, panel_height, created_by_id, created_by_name, created_at, archived) VALUES (?, ?, '', 'everyone', 'open', ?, 300, ?, 'Host', ?, 0)
INSERT INTO app_exquisite_corpse__handoffs (id, round_id, member_id, position, connectors, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, 0, ?, ?)
SELECT id FROM app_exquisite_corpse__handoffs WHERE round_id = ?
